suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `sync-parity-worker` to stop prescribing `npm --prefix apps/desktop run test -- --maxWorkers=7` and instead use the repo's supported targeted Vitest patterns plus the mission's targeted `xcodebuild test -only-testing:` guidance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `work-sync-contract-parity` and `work-scrutiny-round1-consolidated-fixes` both flagged that `.factory/skills/sync-parity-worker/SKILL.md` still prescribes `npm --prefix apps/desktop run test -- --maxWorkers=7` and broad `xcodebuild test`, while `.factory/library/work-sync-validation.md` documents that `--maxWorkers=7` fails in this repo and the mission `AGENTS.md` requires targeted desktop Vitest and iOS `-only-testing:` validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `ios-worker` verification guidance to align with this mission's targeted `xcodebuild test -only-testing:...` policy instead of prescribing the full suite for every feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `work-mobile-session-detail-and-linked-actions` review found `.factory/skills/ios-worker/SKILL.md` still prescribes full `xcodebuild test`, while the mission `AGENTS.md` and the feature instructions require targeted `-only-testing:` validation for Work changes. The worker handoff called out that mismatch explicitly.

rejectedObservations.observation: The consolidated fix review repeated the `sync-parity-worker` validation-command mismatch already noted in round 1.
